css: .card { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.55; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: left; padding: 18px; background: #fafaf7; } .card.nightMode, .nightMode .card { color: #e8e8e8; background: #1e1e1e; } .compare-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .compare-cell { flex: 1; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.45; } .concept-a { background: rgba(168,85,247,0.10); border-left: 3px solid #a855f7; } .concept-b { background: rgba(244,114,182,0.10); border-left: 3px solid #f472b6; } .nightMode .concept-a { background: rgba(168,85,247,0.16); } .nightMode .concept-b { background: rgba(244,114,182,0.16); } .label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #6b6b6b; } .nightMode .label { color: #94a3b8; } .concept-a .label { color: #7c3aed; } .concept-b .label { color: #db2777; } .nightMode .concept-a .label { color: #c4b5fd; } .nightMode .concept-b .label { color: #fbcfe8; } .difference { margin-top: 14px; padding: 12px 14px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.10); border-left: 3px solid #22c55e; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .nightMode .difference { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.16); } .difference-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #6b6b6b; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; } .nightMode .difference-label { color: #94a3b8; } code { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Menlo, monospace; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.92em; } .nightMode code { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .source { margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.2); font-size: 13px; color: #6b6b6b; font-style: italic; } .nightMode .source { border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #94a3b8; } img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; }
